name: CheckSmart
description_short: CheckSmart at 5627 Outer Loop in Louisville, KY offers check cashing and quick loans.
description_long:
The CheckSmart location at 5627 Outer Loop brings quick financial services to Louisville's south side. This standalone branch operates Monday through Thursday from 9AM to 7PM, Friday from 8AM to 7PM, and Saturday from 9AM to 4PM, with Sunday closures. Louisville residents and workers on the south-central corridor can access check-cashing services during these convenient hours.

Services at this Louisville address include check cashing, payday loans, installment loans, and other short-term financial products. For questions about rates, eligibility, or what documents you'll need, call the Outer Loop branch at 502-961-8554.

If you're in Louisville, KY and need fast cash or check-cashing services, 5627 Outer Loop is conveniently located and ready to serve. Bring a valid government-issued photo ID and your checks or account information. CheckSmart is designed for customers who need quick access to funds.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee policy found on public-facing pages. Contact provider for details.

tiers.name: Short-Term Loans
features: Payday loans repaid on next paycheck
Installment loans with multiple scheduled payments
Title loans using vehicle as collateral
APR 6.63%–35.99% for qualified consumers; varies by state and product

tiers.name: Tax Preparation
features: In-store tax preparation by trained staff

tiers.name: Financial Services
features: Check cashing for payroll, government, and personal checks
Green Dot® Visa® Prepaid Debit Card loading

certifications: State-licensed lender in all operating states

pros: Founded in 1987 — nearly 40 years of operations in alternative consumer finance
Same-day or next-business-day cash disbursement for qualified loan applicants
One-stop financial services hub: loans, check cashing, wire transfers, bill pay, prepaid cards, and tax prep in a single location
Mobile app (Google Play) supports loan applications from $200–$5,000 without an in-store visit
Parent company Community Choice Financial has BBB accreditation dating to 1998 and CheckSmart locations hold A+ ratings
Published APR range (6.63%–35.99%) provides a baseline for qualified borrowers to compare before applying
Online portal and enrollment available at secure.checksmart.com for account management and digital applications
cons: Payday and title loan effective rates are only disclosed at application — the advertised 6.63%–35.99% range may not reflect what most applicants actually receive
Check cashing fees are not publicly listed, making it impossible to comparison-shop without visiting a store or calling
Geographic footprint is concentrated in Midwest and South — consumers in other regions cannot access in-store services
Title loans use a vehicle as collateral, creating significant repossession risk if the borrower defaults
Community Choice Financial and its CheckSmart brand have faced regulatory scrutiny in Ohio regarding payday lending practices
best_for: Unbanked consumers who need immediate cash and lack a traditional bank account
Paycheck-to-paycheck workers facing an unexpected expense before their next payday
Consumers who need multiple financial services (check cashing, bill pay, wire transfer) in one visit
Borrowers in the Midwest or South who prefer in-person loan assistance over fully digital lenders
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Midwest and South who need same-day cash or bundled alternative financial services that a conventional bank would not provide. The main caveat is cost: payday and title loan products can carry high effective rates, and fees are not fully disclosed until application, so this is a last-resort or convenience option rather than a cost-competitive one.
services: Green Dot® Visa® Prepaid Debit Cards
Mobile App Loan Applications ($200–$5,000, Google Play)
meta_description: CheckSmart at 5627 Outer Loop, Louisville, KY. Check cashing, payday loans, and financial services available.
